name: product-description
description: Product listings for own site, Amazon, Shopify, and other marketplaces
usage_hint: Use for product listings on your own site or marketplaces (Amazon, Shopify, Etsy). Covers the title, description, bullet points, and specs. Not for feature announcements or changelogs.

criteria.name: marketplace-optimization
criteria.description: Marketplace algorithm and buyer behaviour require specific optimisation patterns

criteria.name: value-proposition-clarity
criteria.description: Buyers decide in seconds whether a product solves their problem

criteria.name: technical-accuracy
criteria.description: Inaccurate specs cause returns and damage trust

criteria.name: conversion-potential
criteria.description: The listing must convert browsers to buyers

criteria.name: seo-effectiveness
criteria.description: Marketplace search is the primary discovery channel

criteria.name: customer-empathy
criteria.description: Listings that address buyer concerns reduce friction

criteria.name: brand-consistency
criteria.description: Consistent voice across listings builds brand trust
